tahino-pie-with-puff-pastry-macedonian-a.name: Tahino Pie With Puff Pastry (macedonian)
instructions: Add the almonds to the blender first until they become powder.
Add the tahini, honey and spices to the bowl and mix well.
In an oily baking pan, spread 3 crust leaves, sprinkle them in between with some sesame oil.
Sprinkle the surface of the leaf with half the almond-sugar.
Spread 2 more sheets, oiled.
Make sure the leaves stand a little on the side of the baking pan.
Add half of the filling and half of the halva with a spoon to rub.
Cover the filling with 2 political leaves, oiled in between.
Add the rest of the filling and the halva.
We turn the edges of the leaf inwards.
Cover with 2 oily leaves and sprinkle with the remaining almond-sugar mixture.
Cover the pie with the last 3 leaves, after sprinkle with sesame oil.
Add the edges to the side of the pie and cut it into pieces.
Oil the surface with sesame oil and sprinkle with water.
Bake in a well preheated ocean, at 150 degrees C, for about 1 hour and 15′, until the pie is well browned.
We want the leaf to be baked until it's inside and browned everywhere.
As we heat it out of the oven, pour it with honey and let it cool.

taramo-salad-mousse-without-bread-argiro.name: Taramo Salad Mousse Without Bread
instructions: In the mixer (ideally with rhableder and high-tight container), add the tarmac, lemon juice and grated or chopped onion.
Beat the ingredients until they become smooth ointment.
Slowly add the sunflower oil, continuing to strike steadily. It starts to bond and become creamy.
Add the olive oil for more body and perfume. The texture will become thicker.
gradually pour frozen water, little by little, beating at the same time, until the mousse has the desired, light texture. He may not need all the water.
Optionally, add a little finely chopped dill at the end and mix gently with a spoon.
Try and, if necessary, add some lemon for more acidity or some more oil for a softer taste.
Transfer the taramosalad mousse into a glass vessel with lid.
Store in the refrigerator for several days.

tater-tot-breakfast-bake.name: Tater Tot Breakfast Bake
instructions: In a bowl, beat the eggs with milk, salt, and pepper. Set aside.
Spread the sausage over the bottom of a glass 9×13-inch (35 cm x 25 cm) baking dish. Pour on the onion soup, and mix with the sausage.
Sprinkle the cheddar cheese evenly over the top.
Cover with the lined up tater tots, and pour the egg mixture over everything.
Bake uncovered at 177°C (180°C) for one hour.
Enjoy!

texas-caviar.name: Texas Caviar

ingredients.prep: stemmed, seeded and cut into small dice

instructions: Mix all ingredients in a medium bowl; cover and refrigerate 2 hours or up to 2 days. Before serving, adjust seasonings to taste, adding extra vinegar, salt and pepper. Transfer to a serving bowl.

thai-spareribs.name: Thai Spareribs
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C. Arrange ribs in single layer in large roasting pan. Add just enough boiling water to cover ribs. Cover pan with foil. Oven-braise ribs until almost tender, about 1 1/2 hours.

Meanwhile, cut bottom 2 inches from each lemongrass stalk (discard upper portions). Slice lemongrass into thin rounds; place in blender. Add 1/2 cup tamari, sugar, Sherry, peanut sauce, sesame oil, garlic, and ginger; blend until almost smooth. Blend in coconut milk and remaining 6 tablespoons tamari for marinade.

Cool ribs, still covered, 30 minutes. Transfer ribs to heavy-duty 2-gallon resealable plastic bag; discard braising liquid. Pour marinade into bag. Seal top and turn several times to coat ribs evenly. Refrigerate overnight, turning occasionally.

Preheat oven to 177°C. Using tongs, arrange ribs in single layer on large rimmed baking sheet. Spoon marinade from bag over ribs. Roast uncovered until ribs are very tender, basting often with marinade, about 1 1/2 hours. Arrange ribs on platter. Scrape marinade into pitcher for sauce; spoon off fat that rises to surface. Brush sauce generously over ribs. Serve with Sesame-Cilantro Rice, passing remaining sauce alongside.

the-ba-smash-burger.name: The Ba Smash Burger

ingredients.prep: mayonnaise, shredded iceberg lettuce, and dill pickle slices (for serving)

instructions: Heat a cast-iron griddle or large heavy skillet over medium-high until very hot, about 2 minutes, then lightly brush with vegetable oil. Divide ground beef into 4 equal portions (do not form patties).

Working in batches if needed, place portions on griddle and smash flat with a spatula to form 4"-diameter patties (craggy edges are your friend). Season liberally with salt and cook, undisturbed, until outer edges are brown, about 2 minutes. Flip patties, season with salt, and place a slice of cheese on top of each patty. Cook until cheese droops and burgers are medium-rare, about 1 minute.
Serve patties on rolls with ketchup, mayonnaise, lettuce, and pickles.

the-silkiest-carbonara.name: The Silkiest Carbonara

ingredients.prep: or  0.75 teaspoon freshly ground green peppercorns plus  0.75 teaspoon freshly ground pink peppercorns plus  0.5 teaspoon freshly ground white peppercorns

instructions: Cook guanciale in a large skillet over medium-low heat, stirring frequently, until fat renders but guanciale is not browned, about 5 minutes. Pour into a fine-mesh sieve set over a small bowl; reserve drippings. Transfer guanciale to a large bowl and let cool slightly. Add egg yolks and egg to bowl; whisk to blend.
Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Drain, reserving ½ cup pasta cooking liquid.

Immediately add rigatoni, 2 Tbsp. pasta cooking liquid, and 1 tsp. guanciale drippings to egg mixture; toss to coat. Working in 3 batches, gradually add ½ cup Pecorino, stirring and tossing to melt between batches. Add 2 tsp. black pepper; toss until sauce thickens, adding more pasta water by tablespoonfuls if needed. Season with salt and pepper.
Divide among bowls. Garnish with Pecorino.

this-is-how-the-famous-spiral-potatoes-a.name: This Is How The Famous Spiral Potatoes Are Made
this-is-how-the-famous-spiral-potatoes-a.original_name: Así se hacen las famosas papas en espiral
instructions: En un recipiente mezcla el aceite de oliva con la paprika.
Agrega la pimienta, el romero y la sal.
Mix very well with the help of a small handshake or spoon.
Introduce un palo a la mitad de la papa, de un extremo al otro.
Cut it as a spiral, divide the cuts. Reserve.
Put the potatoes in a baking bowl and bathe them with oil and cover them completely.
Luego, espolvorea con queso parmesano.
Hornea at 177-3) for 40 minutes or until golden.
Sirve y disfruta.

toasted-freekeh-and-salmon-salad.name: Toasted Freekeh And Salmon Salad
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Toast freekeh on a rimmed baking sheet until lightly browned, 5–8 minutes.

Bundle onion, garlic, thyme, rosemary, and bay leaf in a piece of cheesecloth; tie closed with kitchen twine. Drop sachet into a large pot of salted boiling water, add freekeh, and cook until al dente, 15–20 minutes. Drain; spread out freekeh on a rimmed baking sheet to cool.

Season flesh side of salmon with salt. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high and cook salmon, starting skin side down, until golden brown, about 4 minutes per side for medium-rare. Transfer salmon to a platter and let rest 15 minutes.

Whisk olive oil, lemon zest, lemon juice, and yogurt in a large bowl. Add cooled freekeh, season with salt, and toss to coat. Mix in cucumbers, dill, mint, and parsley. Divide among plates. Flake salmon into bite-size pieces and arrange over freekeh.
Do Ahead: Freekeh can be cooked 1 day ahead. Transfer to airtight container and keep chilled.

toasted-coconut-cake-trifle.name: Toasted-coconut-cake Trifle

ingredients.item: American neufchâtel or reduced-fat cream cheese

instructions: In a bowl, combine Neufchâtel, 1/3 cup sugar, milk and coconut extract. Heat oven to 177°C. Spread coconut evenly on a baking sheet; toast, stirring once or twice, until golden, 5 to 10 minutes. In each of four 8-ounce serving glasses, divide and layer half of coconut cream, half of cake cubes and half of toasted coconut; repeat with remaining cream, cake and coconut. Refrigerate at least 1 hour or up to 24. If garnishing with candied lime: Bring a half-full small pot of water to a boil. Place lime peels in a small mesh sieve; set over pot to submerge peels; boil 2 minutes. Remove sieve and run peels under cold water. Repeat boiling and cooling process with fresh water. Refill same pot with 1/3 cup fresh water and 1/3 cup sugar; bring to a boil. Place sieve over pot so peels are submerged; reduce heat to medium and simmer 5 minutes. Pat peels dry with a paper towel; in a bowl, toss with remaining 2 teaspoons sugar to coat. Top trifles with candied peels; serve.

tomato-dipping-sauce-and-crackers-lezzet.name: Tomato Dipping Sauce And Crackers

ingredients.item: Half-water cup olive oil dried tomatoes

instructions: 1. Mix all the materials in the kitchen robot for Sauce.
2. Visit olive oil on the bowl.
3. Decorate the cube chopped dried tomatoes and fesle.
4. For Kraker, mix and knead materials.
5. For the seafront, add azar azar water.
6.  30 dakika dinlendirin.
7. Finely open dough between two greasy paper and place on the tray.
8. slice square with pizza knife and cook for 15-20 minutes in the oven set to 175 degrees.
9. Serve together with sos after cooling.

tomato-pie-with-cheesy-herb-leaf-argiro.name: Tomato Pie With Cheesy Herb Leaf

ingredients.item: 50 gritted parmesan or other hard cheese
A little rosemary fresh finely chopped
Few olives without pits cut into slices
50 gritted parmesan or other hard cheese
A little rosemary fresh finely chopped
Few olives without pits cut into slices

instructions: Make the cheese dough first for the tomato pie.
Place all the ingredients in bowls and mix them in a little bit.
Spread the dough into a thin layer by pressing the fingers on a large oily baking pan. (The kitchen pan is ideal).
Sprinkle the whole dough with the toast.

Cut the tomatoes into thin slices, remove the seeds, salt them and leave them on absorbent paper for 10′ to draw. Place them on the left and sprinkle with feta cheese, salt blushom and pepper. Add the olives and sprinkle with the olive oil.
Bake in a well preheated ocean in the air at 170oC for about 35′-40′ until the dough is golden. In the last quarter, add the herbs.
Let it stand 10′ to stabilize and serve the pie warm or cold.

tomato-rice.name: Tomato Rice

ingredients.prep: halved crosswise, seeds removed, coarsely chopped

ingredients.item: Long-grain white rice (such as basmati or jasmine)

instructions: Heat oil in a medium pot over medium. Add onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and golden brown, 8–10 minutes. Add garlic, season with salt and pepper, and cook, stirring occasionally, until garlic is softened and onion is lightly charred around the edges, about 5 minutes.

Stir tomato paste into onion mixture and cook, stirring often, until slightly darkened in color and beginning to stick to bottom of pot, about 3 minutes. Add tomatoes and cook, still stirring, until tomatoes burst and mixture starts to thicken, about 5 minutes. Add rice, cinnamon, and turmeric and cook, stirring, until spices are fragrant, about 30 seconds.

Pour 2¼ cups water into pot, give the mixture a stir, and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and cover pot. Let steam until water is absorbed and rice is cooked through, 20–25 minutes. Remove from heat and let sit (still covered) 10 minutes. Uncover, add butter, and fluff with a fork.
Serve topped with herbs and dollops of yogurt.

tomato-curry-chicken.name: Tomato-curry Chicken

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground pepper

instructions: Preheat broiler to high with a rack in the top third of the oven. Cut root ends off of the onion, then cut the onion in half through the cut ends. Remove the peel and finely chop the onion. Using the side of a measuring spoon, peel the ginger. Slice off 3 thin coins of ginger and then finely grate the remaining. Peel and finely grate the garlic.
In a large bowl, whisk ¾ cup of the yogurt with 1 ½ teaspoons of the garam masala and half each of the grated ginger and grated garlic. Season generously with salt and pepper.
Cut the chicken into large bite-sized pieces and toss with the yogurt mixture.
Scrape the chicken onto a rimmed baking sheet spread in a single layer. Broil, turning a few times, until golden and just cooked through, about 15 minutes.

Meanwhile, while the chicken cooks, melt 1 tablespoon of the butter in a small saucepan, over medium-high. Add the rice, the ginger coins, and a large pinch of salt and cook, stirring, for 1 minute. Pour 1 ¼ cup of water into the saucepan and bring to a boil. Cover and reduce the heat to a gentle simmer. Cook until the grains are tender and the water is evaporated about 15 minutes.

In a large high-sided skillet, melt the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter over medium and add the onion. Cook, stirring occasionally until softened, about 4 minutes. Add the ginger, garlic, and remaining 1 ½ teaspoons of garam masala and stir until fragrant, about 2 min.
Pour 3/4 cup of water and the two cans of Campbell's® Tomato Soup into the skillet. Stir to combine and bring to a simmer.
Scrape the cooked chicken from the sheet tray into the simmering sauce and gently simmer for 5 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
While the chicken simmers, pick the cilantro leaves and thinly slice the chili.
Remove the ginger coins from the rice and divide among shallow bowls. Top the rice with the curry chicken. Dollop each bowl with the remaining yogurt and sprinkle with chiles and cilantro.

top-chef-junior-falafel-burger.name: Top Chef Junior Falafel Burger
instructions: Spiced green tahini sauce: Pulse garlic, cilantro, parsley, cumin, and 2 teaspoons salt in a food processor until similar in texture to pesto.

Add tahini and lemon juice; process for seconds. With motor running, gradually drizzle in 1⁄2 cup (120 ml) water and process, adding more water to thin if needed, until sauce is light green and the consistency of sour cream. Season with salt.

Falafel: To the bowl of a 2-quart (1.9 liters) food processor, add the chickpeas, onion, parsley, garlic, lemon juice, spices, and eggs. Pulse the ingredients together until just incorporated, forming a wet paste. Don’t over-process.
Transfer the chickpea mixture to a large bowl and add the breadcrumbs, mixing until just incorporated. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 1–2 hours, or overnight.

Pickled red onions: Place onions in a bowl. Heat vinegar, water, sugar, spices, and salt in a small saucepan over high heat, whisking until sugar is dissolved. Bring to a boil, then strain and pour over onions. Press onions down with a spoon until submerged.
Let rest until onions are softened and liquid has cooled, about 25 minutes.
Cabbage slaw: In a bowl, combine all ingredients.
Remove the chilled falafel mixture from the refrigerator and shape into 6 patties.
In a large nonstick skillet, heat about 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
Cook burgers in batches of 3 for 3–4 minutes each side, flipping halfway through. Once they are golden brown and crispy, transfer them to a paper-towel-lined plate and sprinkle lightly with salt.
Assembly: Spread about 1 tablespoon spiced green tahini sauce on the bottom of each bun. Place a burger on each bun, topping each with a tomato slice, pickled red onions, and cabbage slaw.
Nutrition  Calories: 1295 Fat: 101 grams  Carbs: 82 grams Fiber:  13 grams  Sugars: 25 grams  Protein: 20 grams
Enjoy!

tourtiere-meat-pie-spices.name: Tourtière (meat Pie) Spices
instructions: Combine celery salt, pepper, savory, cloves, cinnamon, thyme, sage, and mustard powder in a small bowl. Mix well and store in a sealed jar.

traditional-recipe-for-shrimps-al-pil-pi.name: Traditional Recipe For Shrimps Al Pil Pil
traditional-recipe-for-shrimps-al-pil-pi.original_name: Receta tradicional de gambas al pil pil
instructions: To start with, we'll peel our garlic teeth. We'll use half to cut them into very thin sheets and we'll shredder the other half.
Then we'll wash them and get them into very small pieces. We will be sure to remove the seeds (except for those with an extremely strong spicy).

If for some reason the parsley isn't minced, we'll care about it. The ideal thing is to have fresh parsley and have them washed and drained. We have to mingle it very finely and complete the equivalent of half a cup.

En un bol, mezclaremos un par de cucharadas soperas de aceite de oliva con el ajo triturado, el perejil y las guindillas picadas. Opcionalmente, puedes mezclar este condimento con la ayuda de un mortero.
Then if the shrimp aren't pitted, we'll get to it.
We will soon get a traditional mud pan or a large non-stick frying pan. We'll have an olive oil chorrit, only what's necessary to cover the whole bottom. Then we'll warm up with half low heat.
When the oil's hot, we'll add the garlic that's been steamed and let them cook for 5 minutes, stirring often.

After this time, we will add the pawned prawns and we will pawl them to taste and bathe them with a mixture of guindels, parsley, shredded garlic and oil. We'll let them cook 3 more minutes, and we'll turn to cook them for 2 last minutes, on the other hand.
That's all. The pil pil pil shrimp are ready. It serves immediately, in traditional mud pits. Optional, you can sprinkle the shrimp with a touch of sweet or hot pimenton at the time of serving them.

traditional-recipe-for-tlayudas-from-oax.name: Traditional Recipe For Tlayudas From Oaxaca
traditional-recipe-for-tlayudas-from-oax.original_name: Receta tradicional de las tlayudas de Oaxaca

ingredients.item: 1  pieza de carne de res para cada tlayuda (que puede ser tasajo o cecina.)
1 trozo de chorizo fresco para cada tlayuda.
50 gr de queso oaxaca para cada tlayuda.

instructions: We'll start with peeling the onion and cutting it into wheels. You can press the tires with your fingers so they can separate into thin rings. If you wish, cut the rings in half. Save them.
Luego, lavaremos muy bien y lo picaremos en ruedas muy delgadas. Luego cortaremos las ruedas por la mitad y las reservaremos.

That's good. I usually let them soak with vinegar, or even put them through boiling water quickly. That's how best to get them disinfected. When I'm clear, we'll scold and cut him into tapes or julian. For the pair of aids that we are preparing with this recipe, we will simply complete a cup of chopped cabbage (I specify that, because the 1 / 8 size of cabbage can vary greatly, though a little more cabbage will do no harm to anyone). We'll reserve this other ingredient.

We'll also care about the beans. They have to be made a dough. If that's not the case, we'll smash them or liquidate them. Then we'll get them hot and keep them under low fire, till I get to use them. They will have to be monitored and removed from time to time, so they don't stick.
Warm up a paddle or plate. Filling with a little seat or butter and cook beef and chorizo.
Meanwhile, you can tap to cut the avocado by half and then into thin cuts. Fold them with half lemon juice so they don't get rusted or blackened. We'll have them put up for a while.
When the meat are cooked we will remove them from the comal or plate. Then we'll grease our tortillas with some seat or butter and cook them quickly, so they'll have a crispy and roasted texture.

Then we'll get our tortillas out of the heat and put them with bean dough on one face and help ourselves with a spoon. Later, we will spread the onion and cabbage rings or strips. We will put Oaxaca cheese into filaments with our hands and we will place the pieces above our aids.

We will soon place his piece of beef and his piece of chorizo on every aid. We'll decorate with the pieces of avocado and tomato. We have to do everything very quickly so that the help doesn't get cold and the omelette doesn't get cold.
Servir inmediatamente, con una buena salsa roja mexicana.

treated-pitas-lezzet.name: Treated Pitas

ingredients.item: Red pepper with half a frost;

instructions: 1. In the olive oil of the onion you eat for the inner mortar and olive oil, soak the color of the meat until you turn.
2. In addition to the peppers you've filled with the cube and taste it with salt and spices.
3. Take the pepper from the stove.
4. Mix melted butter, sunflower oil, salt, egg, egg white and yogurt in a wide container.
5. In addition to the baking powder and flour, knead it in order to achieve a dough in the consistency of ear nozzle.
6. Wrap the dough on stretch film and rest for 15-20 minutes.
7. Lightly open with the help of small bees from the chopped dough and a roller.
8. Share the chopped mortar to the middle of the dough.
9. Fold the edges and shape the pide.
10. Remove 1 tablespoon of sunflower oil planted egg yolk, sprinkle sesame.
11. 11. Preheated 180 degree in oven, cook until they fry.
12. Serve hot.
12. August Take a look at an alternatively mined pide recipe.

treviso-salad-with-orange-vinaigrette-an.name: Treviso Salad With Orange Vinaigrette And Manchego

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Whisk oil, orange juice, honey, and vinegar in a large bowl until well blended. Season vinaigrette to taste with salt and pepper.
Add Treviso to bowl with vinaigrette; toss to coat. Divide among plates. Scatter walnuts over. Using a vegetable peeler, shave cheese onto salads. Garnish with parsley and orange zest.

tuna-and-rice-casserole.name: Tuna And Rice Casserole
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray a 2-quart casserole dish with cooking spray.

Combine milk, both soups, tuna, rice, celery, onion, bell pepper, garlic, oregano, parsley, black pepper, and salt in a large bowl and mix until well incorporated. Pour into the prepared dish and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake in the preheated oven until rice is tender, about 1 hour and 30 minutes. Let cool slightly before serving, about 10 minutes.

tuna-bolognese-teleculinaria.name: Tuna Bolognese
instructions: Descasque e pique grosseiramente a cebola e os alhos e aloure-os num tacho com o azeite.
Open the tuna cans, pour the liquid and add the tuna to the saute. Also add the tomato and pulp, wrap and cook a little.
Season the bolognese with salt and pepper and let it be clear. In the end, add the oregano and involve. Serve with boiled spaghetti.

tuna-flutes-recipe-comedera.name: Tuna Flutes Recipe
instructions: Open the tuna cans and scrain the oil. Add to a bowl.
Peel the onion and cut into small pieces. Do the same with the tomato.
Jalapeno, remove his seed and cut into small pieces.
Add onion and tomato and jalapeno to the bowl.
It incorporates mayonnaise, salt, parsley and lemon juice. That's a good mix.
Warm a frying pan with vegetable oil.
Fill each tortilla with a portion of tuna.
Fold the tortilla sides into and then wrap them up.
Fry tortillas till they are well golden and crispy.
Once ready, remove excess oil with absorbing paper and enjoy them with some cream of your choice.

turkey.name: Turkey
instructions: Rub turkey inside and out with kosher salt; place in a large stockpot and cover with cold water. Cover and refrigerate to allow turkey to soak in brine solution for 12 hours, or overnight.

Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Remove turkey from brine and discard liquid. Pat turkey dry thoroughly with paper towels — inside and out. This removes excess moisture and also helps skin crisp during roasting.
Brush turkey with 1/2 of the melted butter.

Place the turkey breast-side down on a roasting rack in a shallow roasting pan. Stuff the cavity with half the onions, carrots, celery, one sprig of thyme, and the bay leaf. Scatter the remaining vegetables and thyme in the pan around the turkey. Pour white wine over the vegetables.

Roast turkey in the preheated oven, uncovered, until no longer pink at the bone and the juices run clear, about 3 ½ to 4 hours. Carefully turn turkey breast-side up about 2/3 through the roasting time, and brush with remaining butter. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the thigh, near the bone, should read 74°C (74 degrees C).
Allow turkey to rest for 30 minutes before carving.

turkey-ham-sandwich-lezzet.name: Turkey Ham Sandwich
instructions: 1. Extract the flour into a large bowl.
2. Add and blend salt, sugar and yeast.
3. Slowly add water and knead.
4. Leave over 40 minutes to swim with a damp cloth.
5. Relate the cheese of Kasar.
6. To add and mix pepper leaves.
7. Cut the punch size parts from the dough and open with the roller on the counterpart.
8. Spread the grated cheese, leaving 2 cm space from the edges.
9. Close the edges correctly and index the oiled paper serial tray.
10. Cook until the oven, set to 180 degrees.
11. 11. Serve hot.

turkey-in-the-shell-argiro.name: Turkey In The Shell

ingredients.item: All the cooking fluids (stayed in the baking pan)
All the cooking fluids (stayed in the baking pan)

instructions: In a bowl, combine the butter, thyme and lemon zest.
Carefully lift the skin from the meat and brush the mixture inside between the skin and the seek. This will help the meat to be cooked without drying, as the butter will "light" it during cooking.
Draw the neck skin, turn it upwards and fasten it with a toothpick or sew it to close well.

Salt and pepper the inside of the belly and fill with the filling, without pressing it, so that the heat can circulate properly. Any extra filling, wrap it in parchment paper and foil and bake on the side.
Tie or throw the turkey so that words and Wings are close to the body — this helps to keep its shape and remain humor.
Add 2 tablespoons of olive oil, salt and pepper and place the turkey on a pot with the breast up, ideal on a grill to drain the fat.
Preheat the evening well to 220°3′ in residence and place the hall on the last grill. Bake for 40 minutes, until the surface is golden.
Then lower the temperature to 160°C and continue baking, covered for about 3 hours. Towards the end, we expresse and let the skin turn brown so that it becomes crispy.
Once cooked, remove it from the oven and cover it with aluminum foil for 20 minutes in order to regain its juices, which during baking have risen to the surface.

turmeric-caramel-cod.name: Turmeric Caramel Cod

ingredients.item: -oz. cod or other flaky whitefish fillets

ingredients.prep: thinly sliced white onion, mint leaves, and cilantro leaves with tender stems (for serving)

instructions: Slice 3 limes in half and squeeze through a fine-mesh sieve into a small bowl (you should have about 5 Tbsp. juice); discard seeds. Cut remaining lime into wedges and set aside for serving.

Whisk lime juice, brown sugar, soy sauce, turmeric, cayenne, and a pinch of salt in a small saucepan to combine. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to medium-low. Cook, swirling pan occasionally to keep mixture from bubbling up, until thickened, about 8 minutes. Let caramel cool slightly (it will continue to thicken as it cools).

Meanwhile, pat fish dry, then season with salt. Heat oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Cook fish until flesh is opaque, cooked through, and flakes easily with a fork, about 3 minutes per side.
Divide rice among plates and top each with a fillet. Spoon warm caramel over. Top with white onion, mint, and cilantro. Serve with reserved lime wedges for squeezing over.

twice-baked-potatoes.name: Twice-baked Potatoes

ingredients.item: Finely chopped fresh chives plus more
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 425°. Poke potatoes all over with a fork; rub with oil. Bake directly on oven rack until very soft when squeezed and skins are crisp, 50–60 minutes. Let cool just until you can hold them.
Using a serrated knife, slice potatoes in half lengthwise and scoop flesh into a medium bowl. Add sour cream, butter, chives, and tarragon (if desired); season generously with salt and pepper.
Divide among 4 potato skin halves, piling gloriously high—don’t pack too tightly. (And what about the leftover skins? We say add butter and salt and snack on them.)

Increase oven temperature to 450°. Bake potatoes on a rimmed baking sheet until filling is puffed and browned in spots, 20–25 minutes. Top with more chives. 

Editor’s note: This recipe was originally published in our March 2015 issue and first appeared online in February 2015. Head this way for more of our best potato recipes →
